slides.title: This project will answer three key questions
situationPoints: Leadership has aligned on the ambition, but the path from strategy to execution remains uneven across business units.
Commercial, delivery, and enabling functions are making decisions with different assumptions about sequencing and ownership.
The program now needs a tighter view of where to focus, what to prioritize, and how to mobilize at pace.
Management is asking for a practical implementation model that turns strategic intent into measurable impact.
questions: How do we design an implementation model that fits the organization and realizes the full impact of the new strategy?
Which decisions and workstreams will create the greatest near-term value while preserving long-term strategic flexibility?
What governance, sequencing, and delivery model will keep the transformation moving once priorities are set?
